Flow Core Guide: User Badge Access 

Log into the Building Access System for UMB 

Go to Forms à Building Access Form 

Select “Completing access request for someone else” 

 

Search for user via Last Name 

Graphical user interface, application, Word, website

Description automatically generated 

Select Correct User (Confirm via user’s UMID) 

Graphical user interface, application

Description automatically generated 

Fill out Form 

Graphical user interface, application

Description automatically generated 

Submit form  

Flow Core User Badge Access

Log into the Building Access System
Go to Forms 🡪 Building Access Form
Select “Completing access request for myself”
Fill out Form

Submit form
